title: Capability to have more values in rating (up to 10)
excerpt: Right now, you can only have 5 stars, but it would be nice for survey purposes to be able to have up to 10 stars for ratings.

posts.author: annadayton (Anna Dayton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screen Shot 2022-02-07 at 12.34.50 PM760×716 47 KB

Right now, you can only have 5 stars, but it would be nice for survey purposes to be able to have up to 10 stars for ratings.
